0.text: Mild bronchiectasis in lower zones of both lungs

1.text: Fibrotic changes at apical regions of both lungs

2.text: Progression of ground-glass opacity from pleura to central region of posterior segment

3.text: Progression of ground-glass opacity in medial segment of middle lobe

4.text: Fibrotic changes at posterobasal level consistent with previous findings

5.text: New area of consolidation with air bronchograms in apicoposterior segment of left lung upper lobe

6.text: Consolidative lesion with subcentimeter area of cavitation associated with bronchial tract in anterior portion of apicoposterior segment

8.text: Previously noted focal ground-glass opacity in anteromediobasal segment of lower lobe still present
